src: A waterfall cascading down a rugged cliff, surrounded by greenery and moss-covered rocks. Water splashes into a pool below, with mist and sunlight. A stone bridge arches over the waterfall, framed by trees and vibrant foliage.
edit: A waterfall cascading down a cliff, surrounded by lush greenery with moss-draped rocks. Crystal-clear water splashes into a pool. Trees line the path. A stone bridge arches over the waterfall, framed by foliage and vibrant plant life.

per_image_non_shared_src.click-sluice-0bunJlJn69U-unsplash: The waterfall is centered with sunlight streaming through tree branches, tall trees with dark leaves surround. A stone bridge is in the middle, with dense green foliage and mossy rocks at the sides.
per_image_non_shared_src.dave-hoefler-DBGb9u1Yf6Q-unsplash: A waterfall is centered with golden autumn leaves surrounding it. A stone bridge stands in the middle of the cascading water. The foreground has green shrubbery and brown tree trunks.
per_image_non_shared_src.dave-hoefler-t56YSk_5SPc-unsplash: The waterfall cascades down steep rocks, surrounded by lush greenery and steep cliffs, with a stone bridge arching over the lower cascade and abundant moss and foliage covering the rocks.
per_image_non_shared_src.david-lindahl-WC0W0sESCow-unsplash: Waterfall in the center with mist, surrounded by barren trees, a stone bridge in the middle, with grey rocks and sparse foliage.
per_image_non_shared_src.ethan-dow-5wJiUOE6YNM-unsplash: Waterfall flows down a cliff face, framed by dense green trees and bright sunlight. A stone bridge spans the middle, vibrant foliage covers the cliffs.

per_image_non_shared_edit.click-sluice-0bunJlJn69U-unsplash: A waterfall cascades with sunlight filtering through tree branches. Trees with silver-green leaves form a canopy. A cobblestone bridge arches over it, with moss-covered rocks and emerald foliage beside it.
per_image_non_shared_edit.dave-hoefler-DBGb9u1Yf6Q-unsplash: A mystical waterfall centered with golden autumn leaves, a stone bridge with intricate patterns arches over the water. Foreground has vibrant green shrubbery, brown tree trunks twisted and gnarled, in fairy-tale style.
per_image_non_shared_edit.dave-hoefler-t56YSk_5SPc-unsplash: A waterfall cascades down steep rocks, sparkling in soft light. Lush greenery flanks each side. Steep cliffs surround the scene. A stone bridge with patterns arches over the lower cascade, with rocks covered in moss and foliage.
per_image_non_shared_edit.david-lindahl-WC0W0sESCow-unsplash: A mystical waterfall cascades in the center with mist swirling in the air. Ancient barren trees surround it. A stone bridge arches in the middle with grey rocks around. Sparse vibrant foliage adds to the fantasy scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.ethan-dow-5wJiUOE6YNM-unsplash: A shimmering waterfall cascades down a cliff, surrounded by lush green trees. Sunlight twinkles like scattered pixie dust. An elegant stone bridge arches across the middle. Vibrant foliage flourishes on cliffsides.
